dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6307 IH: Hunger Clearinghouse Enhancement Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Morelle (for himself and Ms. Meng) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act to fund the information clearinghouse through fiscal year 2032, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Hunger Clearinghouse Enhancement Act of 2025.
Section 26 of the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act (42 U.S.C. 1769g) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting , including information with respect to the utilization of trained volunteers, after provide information; and
by inserting resources that address ways to prevent hunger, after food assistance,; and
by striking through 2027. and inserting through 2025, and $750,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2032.
